colors.name: ivory
colors.role: the page — every other decision exists against it; whitespace is rendered in this color

colors.name: plate-paper
colors.role: tipped-in figure plates — a half-step brighter than the page, like coated stock in an uncoated book

colors.name: ink
colors.role: primary text, plate strokes, the masthead (15.0:1 on ivory)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: secondary text — ink at 72% alpha composited over ivory: EN transcreations, captions, footnotes, folios (6.2:1)

colors.name: oxblood
colors.role: the single accent: hairlines, drop cap, footnote numerals, seal, underline draw, focus ring, ::selection (8.7:1 as text)

colors.name: graphite
colors.role: rules ONLY — plate edges, column rule, static link hairline, dotted colophon leaders (3.2:1 — never functional text)

fonts.role: the Korean serif — every Hangul glyph, the masthead 여백, the essay's first language
the Latin text face — EN transcreations, italic folios and captions, the drop cap; answers, never interrupts

texture: Deliberately none. The only 'texture' is paper against paper: tipped-in plates in a half-step brighter stock, rotated ±0.6° with a soft tip-in shadow (0 14px 34px -22px ink @14%), 1px graphite hairlines (solid for structure, dotted for the colophon ledger), and the whitespace itself — section paddings run 16–18vh so the emptiness reads as set, not unset.

motion.name: ease-out-page
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — reveals and cover rise: fast in, long settle

motion.name: ease-ink
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) — time-based stroke draws: even, unhurried

motion.name: ease-band
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.32, 1.42, 0.5, 1) — underline draw with a ~6% overshoot: the rubber-band snap

motion.name: cover cadence
motion.value: chars 120ms + 190ms×i · deck 520ms · rule scaleX 680ms · issue 800ms · foot 1020ms

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 700ms ease-out-page, translateY(14px) → 0, 80ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: footnote slide
motion.value: 700ms ease-out-page, translateX(22px) → 0 at the reference's scroll threshold

motion.name: scrub window
motion.value: starts at spread-top = 70vh; spans min(85% of spread height, 110vh)

motion.name: underline draw
motion.value: in 640ms ease-band, out 220ms ease-ink; stroke-dasharray 1 1 on pathLength=1
